system.name: Honey Heist
system.description: You have a complex plan that requires precise timing. You are also a goddamn bear.
system.credits: A game by Grant Howitt (2017). With thanks to All Out of Bubblegum, 3:16, and (weirdly) Polaris.

stats.name: Bear
stats.description: Use to maul stuff, run and climb, shrug off damage, scare people, and generally do bear stuff.

stats.name: Criminal
stats.description: Use to do anything not directly related to being a bear.

mechanic.default: When you act and the outcome is in doubt, roll a d6. Equal to or under the relevant stat = success. Over = failure.
mechanic.advantage: If you are using your bear special skill or doing something related to your role, roll 2d6 and pick the lowest.

frustration.trigger: The plan fails and you run into difficulty.
frustration.effect: Move one point from Criminal into Bear.

creed.trigger: The plan goes off without a hitch.
creed.effect: Move one point from Bear into Criminal.

voluntaryShifts.method: Flashback scene where the bears plan the heist over coffee and cigarettes in the back room of a seedy bar.

criminalMaxed.result: Lured into a life of crime. You betray the party.

bearMaxed.result: You flip out bear-style and lose it. Animal control picks you up in about half an hour.

characterCreation._comment: Roll 3D6 to determine descriptor, role, and bear type. Audience does not build characters in the Mad Libs format; cast plays pre-built bears.

bearType.name: Panda
bearType.skill: Eat anything that looks like bamboo

bonusHat._comment: Roll 1d8 if your bear wants a hat.

gmTables._comment: Original Howitt setup tables, kept full as a GM fallback. The Mad Libs in showConfig override these with TMP-themed paths.
thePrize: Ultradense megahoney from especially posh bees
A briefcase of pure manuka extract worth $5m
The Queen of All Bees, once exiled, now returned
Black Orchid Honey, which turns anyone who eats it into a goth
Abraham Lincoln's beehive, thought to be haunted by his ghost
Miss Universe 2017, an especially attractive Bee
twist: This place is rigged to blow
There's a rival team of bears

showConfig._comment: Mad Libs Honey Heist at Lucky Straws, May 23 2026. The Mad Libs IS the login. Audience members build an NPC through the creation form, which is the only entry point. Personal fields shape their NPC identity. World fields aggregate as shared votes that the GM resolves at showtime. Stingers (Beats) are pushed live by the GM to individual NPCs.

npcCreation._comment: displayNameTemplate uses {fieldId} from personal fields only.

fields.label: The one thing everyone knows about you
The thing everyone's really after
options: animatronic Bee mascot, said to still hum
prehistoric honey from the very first hive
final reel of Sting II: The Reckoning

stingerQueue.responseTemplate: I {verb} the {noun} and now the {place} is {adjective}.

promptPresets.label: Walk in at the worst moment
promptPresets.prompt: You just walked into the worst possible moment. What do you do?

promptPresets.label: See something you shouldn't have
promptPresets.prompt: You saw something you shouldn't have. Now what?

promptPresets.label: Make it worse
promptPresets.prompt: You tried to stay out of it. That's over. How did you accidentally make it worse?

promptPresets.label: Be the distraction
promptPresets.prompt: The bears need three seconds and a distraction. You're the only one here. Go.
